case_title: CHRISTINE PAXTON ET AL VS. CATHY TSUI ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 413 10TH STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $150.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE SERVED SEP-11-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY
DECLARATION RE: LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LU, OLIVIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA
PROOF OF SERVICE ON NOTICE TO TERMINATE TENANCY; BY MAIL ON 7-29-14 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE CHIAVINO, SAL AS TO DEFENDANT LU, OLIVIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE SERVED SEP-11-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LU, OLIVIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE SERVED SEP-11-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LU, OLIVIA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TSUI, CATHY LU, OLIVIA
